description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a driveway and a garage at the front. The exterior is predominantly white with green accent panels and landscaped green areas surrounding the structure. The house layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof design, and a clear division between living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas. The driveway leads directly to the garage, which is integrated into the main structure, and there are paved walkways and green strips in the front yard. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern, providing natural light to most rooms. The main entryway is centrally located, marked by a small porch and a distinct overhang.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, green accents, and an integrated garage and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with green strips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, garage placement, and the arrangement of rooms along the length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard green spaces and the back entrances to some rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage from the other end and the continuity of the green landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a small porch, overhang, and direct access from the driveway
